title: Front-end software engineer
skills: Builder pattern (Flutter, Jetpack Compose, Swift UI)
description: Front-end software engineer, passionate about mobile, web, and desktop softwares! Through an internship, I aim to develop software-engineering skills, including requirements analysis with clients, client consultation, and creating software products that best fulfill these requirements.
experience: Led a 4-person team as Front-end Lead / Project Lead for 'The Zone' smart calendar (WIP Android mobile application using Flutter and Material UI), including developing a shell script build system. Served as Front-end Lead for 'SimGlobe,' a WIP SPA web-based educational video-game (Vite, Nuxt, React Context, custom SVG graphics). Also, developed 'Steam VPK,' an open-source, personal desktop GUI application following the GNOME Human Interface Guideline and Model-View-Controller pattern.
